offer: For small-scale logistics providers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual processes cause late orders. We automate freight forwarding and customs brokerage instead of manual tracking and paperwork.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of freight forwarding and customs brokerage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics providers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums

try_it: Let users try invoice tracking and document management on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
